ResourceHeader.Description:
USO is situated at an elevation of 750 m in a semi-arid highland 
			region of western India, midway between Delhi and Bombay. USO is administered 
			by the Physical Research Laboratory, headquartered in Ahmedabad.  The main objective 
			of obtaining the high spatial and temporal resolution observations of solar 
			photospheric and chromospheric activity is to understand the various dynamic 
			phenomena occurring on the surface of the Sun.
